hero.lead: SimplyNext designs and builds premium, cross-platform apps – uncompromising in performance, detail and feel.

statement.text: An app isn't finished until it feels effortless. Every motion, every millisecond, every detail serves that one goal.

eatsafely.tagline: Never guess again. Always eat safely.
eatsafely.summary: A personal allergen traffic light, AI weekly meal plans and a food checker for life with intolerances.
description: Gluten, lactose, fructose, histamine, sorbitol – or simply: your body reacts, and sometimes you don't even know exactly why. EatSafely makes every meal safe again, instead of a research project.
You set up your personal allergen traffic light, and the AI plans, checks and rewrites recipes using only what you can tolerate – seasonal, regional and reimagined every day.
For everyone who doesn't want to fight their intolerances, but simply live with them. Because food should bring joy – not anxiety.

features.title: Allergen traffic light
features.text: Rate every problematic ingredient: 🔴 off-limits, 🟡 small amounts only, 🟢 fine – including personal notes the AI understands.

features.title: AI weekly plan
features.text: A complete plan for breakfast, lunch and dinner – built exclusively from what you can tolerate. Seasonal and regional.

features.title: Food checker
features.text: Scan a barcode, photograph an ingredient list, or type it in – an instant result against your personal exclusion list.

features.title: Leftover ideas
features.text: Type or speak what's still in your fridge – and get a creative, tolerable recipe in seconds.

features.title: Recipe transformer
features.text: Paste a URL or recipe text – EatSafely rewrites any recipe for your intolerances. Swapped ingredients are marked.

features.title: Shopping list & favorites
features.text: Ingredients move from the weekly plan to your list with one tap. Check off, export as PDF, save favorite recipes.

pricing.note: Start for free. Upgrade if you need more.

wefixit.tagline: Your smart mechanic, right in your pocket.
wefixit.summary: OBD2 diagnostics, an AI mechanic and repair guides – so you know exactly what's going on with your car.
description: No more expensive workshop visits without a plan. WeFixIt connects your phone via Bluetooth to your OBD2 adapter and reads every stored fault code in seconds – free, with no waiting.
Then let the AI take over: Toni, your personal AI mechanic, answers questions, interprets fault codes and delivers step-by-step repair guides with a tool list and cost estimate.

For anyone who doesn't want to walk into a workshop blind – for tinkerers, budget-conscious drivers, and anyone who wants to understand their car better. Because you have the right to know what's going on with it.

features.title: OBD2 diagnostics
features.text: Read and clear every stored fault code via Bluetooth – in seconds, no workshop, no waiting.

features.title: Ask Toni!
features.text: Your round-the-clock AI mechanic. Send a question, a photo, or a fault code – and get precise answers about your car.

features.title: AI diagnosis
features.text: From fault code to fix: a clear explanation, likely causes, costs, difficulty level and repair guide.

features.title: Live data
features.text: Engine temperature, RPM, lambda values and more in real time – straight from the ECU, refreshed every 500ms.

features.title: Maintenance planner
features.text: Reminders by date or mileage, store receipts and photos, export as PDF or CSV – recurring schedules set automatically.

features.title: Cost tracking
features.text: Fuel with consumption calculations, insurance, workshop visits and more – clear charts show what your car really costs.

free: 6 AI requests per week – renews automatically
premium: Lifetime unlock – pay once, use forever
pricing.note: Start for free. Upgrade if you need more.

nook.tagline: Your AI travel companion – no tourist traps.
nook.summary: AI trip planner, live crowd indicator and automatic audio guides – explore cities like a local, not like a tourist.
description: Discover cities the way they're meant to feel – no crowds, no tourist traps, no rigid routes. NOOK is your intelligent, invisible travel companion: it plans, guides and accompanies you like a local friend.

Tell NOOK where you're going, how long you're staying and what you love – and the AI builds a personalized day plan with optimized routes in seconds. On location, the live crowd indicator shows at a glance which places are calm and which are packed, and your audio guide starts automatically the moment you approach a sight.
NOOK never books on its own and never decides without you – the AI suggests, you stay in control. All location data is anonymized, GDPR-compliant, and everything works offline.

features.title: AI day planner
features.text: Tailor-made itineraries in seconds – with optimized routes, schedules and hotel recommendations right along your path. Plan together and vote on stops democratically.

features.title: Live crowd indicator
features.text: Real-time occupancy for every sight: green means relaxed exploring, red means NOOK knows a quieter alternative. Includes a crowd alert before you're stuck in the masses.

features.title: Automatic audio guide
features.text: Step within 50 meters of a sight and your personal audio guide starts by itself. Professional voices in 7 languages, fully available offline.

features.title: Smart scanner
features.text: Point your camera at a menu – NOOK instantly warns you about hidden fees, inflated prices and the infamous "coperto". Output in your language.

features.title: Transit assistant
features.text: The fastest local connections plus direct links to official tickets – no more guesswork in unfamiliar transit networks.

features.title: Explorer stamp book
features.text: Every sight you visit leaves a GPS-validated stamp. Unlock badges and build your digital travel journal.

free: AI itineraries & map with live crowd indicator
Save everything offline – no roaming needed
pricing.note: Start for free. Go premium when you want to dive deeper.

cocos-world.tagline: Language learning for kids – playful, with CoCo.
cocos-world.summary: A child-friendly language app with five learning worlds, AI pronunciation training and bonus mini-games – learning Turkish as an adventure.
description: Is your child growing up bilingual, or about to discover a new language? CoCo's World turns learning Turkish into a grand adventure: with CoCo, the lovable animated mascot, kids explore five colorful worlds – from CoCo's house to the Istanbul adventure.

The learning path leads step by step from vocabulary to real sentences to pronunciation: your child speaks, the AI gives instant feedback – and in free conversation mode, CoCo even chats with your child in Turkish. After every completed world, bonus mini-games await as a reward.

Made for parents: no ads, a time-limit feature, no account needed for basic access, and voice recordings are never stored permanently. Suitable from age 3 with a parent, independently up to around age 10.

features.title: Five learning worlds
features.text: CoCo's house, the garden, the city, the zoo and the Istanbul adventure – each world brings new vocabulary, sentences and its own bonus mini-game on a growing world map.

features.title: Pronunciation AI
features.text: Your child repeats after CoCo, the app analyzes the pronunciation with AI and gives instant, encouraging feedback – with a natural Turkish voice.

features.title: Free conversation mode
features.text: CoCo holds real little conversations in Turkish – reacting, speaking and praising like a patient learning buddy.

features.title: SuffixPuzzle & games
features.text: Turkish endings (agglutination) explained as a child-friendly puzzle, plus ObjectSearch, SkateRunner, FruitCatch, FlappyCoCo and more.

features.title: Stars, coins & streaks
features.text: Stars for completed lessons, coins to unlock new worlds and a growing plant that shows overall progress.

features.title: Made for parents
features.text: No ads, a time-limit feature, the microphone is used only for pronunciation practice, and no account is needed for basic access. PEGI 3.

free: First learning world with vocabulary, sentences & a mini-game
premium: All five learning worlds & bonus mini-games
AI pronunciation training & free conversation mode
Full progress with stars, coins & streaks
pricing.note: Start for free – a pure learning experience without ads.

werkflow.tagline: AI quotes in seconds – from photo to finished PDF.
werkflow.summary: The smart app for tradespeople: photograph the job site, describe the job by voice – the AI builds the professional PDF quote.
description: No more hours of typing: take a photo of the job site, describe the job with a voice note – and the AI automatically turns it into a complete, professional quote as a PDF. In under 2 minutes, right on site.

Werkflow was built for tradespeople, installers and small businesses across all trades – electricians, painters, plumbers, carpenters or roofers. Customer management, an order dashboard, a materials catalog and digital signatures included: your entire office in your pocket.
More time on site, less time at the desk: create quotes on the spot and send them by email – no catching up in the evening. Your data is encrypted and stored securely in the cloud.

features.title: AI photo analysis
features.text: Photograph the job site or damaged area – the AI recognizes the required materials and work steps and suggests matching quote line items.

features.title: Voice input
features.text: Briefly describe the job by voice – the AI turns your description into structured line items. Works even with dirty hands.

features.title: PDF quotes
features.text: A print-ready PDF in seconds, with your company logo, hourly rates, materials and digital signature – sent straight to the customer by email.

features.title: Customer management
features.text: All customers in one place: store contact details and create quotes with one click, straight from the customer list.

features.title: Order dashboard
features.text: Sent, accepted, declined? Your control center shows every quote and its status at a glance – with a filterable history.

features.title: Materials catalog
features.text: Store your standard materials with units and prices – the AI uses them automatically for consistent, correct calculations.

premium: Business: 100 AI analyses/month, up to 5 team members
Pro: unlimited AI analyses & full team access
pricing.note: Plans for every business – from solo trader to team.
